# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  MyVpcGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway

  MySubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a

  MySubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH and HTTP traffic
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-12345678
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: mykey
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8

  MyRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: myuser
      MasterUserPassword: mypassword
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup
      DbSubnetGroupName: mydbsubnetgroup
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
